name: iplayertv-monorepo
description: IPlayerTV monorepo: desktop (Electron) and mobile (Expo) IPTV players sharing @iplayertv/core.
author: Ramon Gimenes <ramongimenes@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run dev -w apps/desktop
scripts.mobile: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run start -w apps/mobile
scripts.ios: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run ios:device -w apps/mobile
scripts.android: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run android:device -w apps/mobile
scripts.android:apk: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run android:apk -w apps/mobile
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w apps/desktop
scripts.dist: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run dist -w apps/desktop
